axiom: axiom (forall s: Seq, m: int, n: int :: { Seq#Take(Seq#Take(s, m), n) } 0 <= n && n <= m && m <= Seq#Length(s) ==> Seq#Take(Seq#Take(s, m), n) == Seq#Take(s, n));
alone_result: 16 verified, 2 errors (fixes loop invariants; 2 pre-existing Boogie-level lemma errors remain)
notes: Take-of-Take axiom is necessary but not sufficient alone at the Boogie level. The Take-of-full-length axiom is also needed to fix SeqMinIsMin/SeqMaxIsMax lemma verification at the Boogie level.
